macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Major Indexes Close Lower on March 13, 2026
items.summary: S&P 500 ended at 6,632.53, down 0.60%; Nasdaq Composite at 22,105.36, down 0.93%; Dow Jones at 46,559.83, down 0.25%. Markets showed broad declines amid ongoing trading activity.

items.title: Bovespa Index Ends Week 0.95% Lower at 177,653.31
items.summary: Brazil's Bovespa fell 1,711.51 points or 0.95% for the week, marking three consecutive weeks of declines and the largest three-week drop since 2020. It dropped 0.91% on March 13, down 7.23% from its 52-week high.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: xAI Undergoes Major Restructuring with Only 2 of 11 Co-Founders Remaining
items.summary: Elon Musk's xAI is restructuring due to foundational flaws, losing 9 of its original 11 co-founders, as it aims to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic amid talent retention challenges in the AI industry.

items.title: US Government Revokes Controversial AI Hardware Export Rule
items.summary: The US Commerce Department has withdrawn a draft rule that would have mandated investments from foreign companies for AI hardware exports, though new export rules are still under development to balance national security and global AI market influence.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Highguard Officially Shuts Down Servers
items.summary: Highguard has officially shut down its servers today, with developers citing negative discourse as the primary cause. This marks the end of service for the game amid ongoing industry challenges.

items.title: Gang of Dragon Development at Risk After NetEase Cuts Funding
items.summary: NetEase has ended financial support for Nagoshi Studio's RPG Gang of Dragon, which needs $44.4 million more to complete. The studio is seeking new partners to continue independently.

items.title: Rob Pardo Urges GDC Execs to Protect Game Dev Teams
items.summary: At GDC 2026 on March 12, Rob Pardo delivered a keynote emphasizing the value of development teams behind successful games, addressing layoffs, rising costs, and industry competition. He highlighted his work on Bonfire Studios' upcoming PvP game Arkheron.

items.title: Nintendo Announces Major Switch 2 Focus for 2026
items.summary: Nintendo is prioritizing the Switch 2 console in 2026 with improved hardware, new titles like The Duskbloods and Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave, third-party support including Hades II, and potential PS5 ports. Switch 2 Edition updates are planned for existing games.

items.title: Yoshi's Voice Revealed for Super Mario Galaxy Movie
items.summary: The voice cast for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie includes Donald Glover as Yoshi and Luis Guzmán as Wart, with a star-studded lineup heading to theaters. Special 40th-anniversary digital trading cards are available on the Nintendo Today! app.

items.title: Crimson Desert Launch Trailer Showcases Global Release
items.summary: The launch trailer for Crimson Desert reveals global release times, new gameplay footage, and PC-specific features. The game is preparing for its upcoming release.

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem DLC in Development
items.summary: Resident Evil Requiem (RE9) is getting DLC that expands the 'World of Requiem,' with a Switch 2 port also in the works as part of Nintendo's third-party expansions.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Unveils 2026 MacBook Air with M5 Chip and $100 Price Increase
items.summary: Apple launched refreshed MacBook Air models featuring the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7, and doubled base storage to 512GB, but at a $100 higher price. The new MacBook Neo, priced $500 lower, adds competitive pressure within Apple's lineup.[1]

items.title: Meta Plans Major Layoffs Impacting Up to 20% of Workforce in 2026
items.summary: Meta is preparing sweeping layoffs potentially affecting 20% or more of its 90,000+ employees to cut costs amid heavy investments in AI infrastructure and slowing ad revenue growth.[2]
